drifts.description: R5 (5.0.0) retains media backbone element but adds supportingInfo backbone element to carry additional contextual information; not present in R4
R5 (5.0.0) adds a new supportingInfo backbone element with type and reference sub-elements; not present in R4
R5 (5.0.0) adds a composition element (Reference(Composition)) for structured narrative; not present in R4
R5 (5.0.0) adds a note element (Annotation) for comments about the diagnostic report; not present in R4
R5 (5.0.0) adds a study element (Reference(GenomicStudy, ImagingStudy)) replacing imagingStudy; not present in R4 as combined element
R5 (5.0.0) removes imagingStudy element; replaced by the broader study element that includes GenomicStudy references
R5 (5.0.0) updates DiagnosticReportStatus value set with clarified code definitions and new modifier status
